description: Capitale européenne au patrimoine alsacien. Forte communauté musulmane, grande mosquée et large choix d'adresses halal.

infoPratique.conseilHalal: Ville non-musulmane : repérez les restaurants halal signalés et les mosquées via l'application avant votre visite.

description_en: Strasbourg may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 156 halal restaurants and 23 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Strasbourg, France, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Strasbourg: 150 halal restaurants listed, 23 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4/5.
